character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Participated in discussions about the treasure map and ship's arrangements, expressed agreement with the captain's points.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Expressed concerns about mutiny, rearranged ship's powder and berths, emphasized responsibility for the crew's safety.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Arrow
character_dossiers.biography: Described as a mate, criticized for being too familiar with the crew.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Expressed dislike for Mr. Arrow, took a firm stance on the captain's actions.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Protested the disclosure of the island's location, expressed skepticism about the map's existence.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Expressed concerns about mutiny, rearranged ship's powder and berths, emphasized responsibility for the crew's safety.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Participated in discussions about the treasure map and ship's arrangements, expressed agreement with the captain's points.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in context of the map's disclosure, part of the crew.

character_dossiers.name: John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in context of the crew's dynamics, part of the crew.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in context of the crew's dynamics, part of the crew.

character_dossiers.name: the cook
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in context of the crew's work, part of the crew.

character_dossiers.name: Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in context of the crew's arrangements, part of the crew.
